context: Agent diagnoses multiple template rendering errors in a Helm configmap template and proposes correct fixes without modifying any files.

checklist.name: template vs include issue identified
checklist.description: Agent explains that 'template' cannot be used in pipelines (does not return a value) and recommends replacing it with 'include'.

checklist.name: indent vs nindent issue identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies that 'indent' requires a string input but 'include' returns interface{}; recommends using 'nindent' which adds a leading newline and handles the type correctly.

checklist.name: JSON string quoting issue identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies that .Values.environment in JSON context needs to be quoted (using the 'quote' function or wrapped in double quotes) to produce valid JSON.

checklist.name: required with empty string behaviour explained
checklist.description: Agent identifies that 'required' passes when the value is set to an empty string '' because the value is not nil; explains the user needs to provide a non-empty value or use a different validation approach.

checklist.name: Source template fix rationale
checklist.description: Agent explains that YAML/template errors must be fixed in the source template, not the rendered output, because helm template regenerates the output each time.
